title: Showbiz TFM Integration Demo
description: The Demo for the Integration of  Showbiz in The FNaF Mod's Rework!
body:
![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/The_Five_Nights_at_Freddys_Mod/BH_TFNAFM_banner1.webp) > This mod requires Showbiz to work properly! > > Download the Showbiz mod [here!](https://modrinth.com/mod/showbiz) [![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/The_Five_Nights_at_Freddys_Mod/BH_TFNAFM_promo.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/DevMultiverse) This is a demo version of the official Showbiz integration for the FNaF mod rework! this mod also includes: - White Black, Blue Black and Blue Red Floor Tiles - Red, Black and Purple Wall Tiles - Variated Carpet - Dark Walls and Light Walls # The Bots in this Demo are: - Diner Freddy - Diner Bonnie - Diner Chica - Diner Foxy - Fredbear - Spring Bonnie # > For more on how to use Showbiz visit the official Wiki [here!](https://github.com/FlooferLand/showbiz/wiki) # ![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/The_Five_Nights_at_Freddys_Mod/BH_TFNAFM_banner2.webp) [

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/513493/description_8c61b755-377c-4369-9110-a816f4d50f16.png)](https://discord.gg/ke2bF9f8TE)[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/513493/description_1edb5a8c-e8ae-4dbb-a2e8-90f884f4f296.png)](https://www.patreon.com/MephilisDevMultiverse)[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/513493/description_5b07a4bb-dd4e-44bd-a8fb-427c6b21efc3.png)](https://twitter.com/ModFnaf)[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/513493/description_f219d32b-abf5-46a1-bf45-3ab39d05e32f.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@FNAFMod) # ###### This mod is based on the Five Nights at Freddy's franchise by Scott Cawthon ###### all the characters are owned by Scott Cawthon unless stated otherwise **You're not allowed to repost this mod on any other site than the ones I personally link to.**
